name: Affirm Holdings, Inc.
business: Affirm provides point-of-sale payment solutions and installment loans to consumers and merchants. It offers pay-over-time options, including 0% APR and interest-bearing loans, as well as the Affirm Card and high-yield savings account. Revenue comes from merchant fees, card interchange, and interest income on loans.

exposures.sentence: We are building the next generation payment network.
Our platform is explicitly designed and engineered to integrate with a wide range of merchants.
Our solutions use machine learning, artificial intelligence, cloud-based technologies, and other modern tools to create differentiated and scalable products.
We have three main loan product offerings: Pay-in-X, 0% annual percentage rate ( APR ) monthly installment loans and interest-bearing monthly installment loans.
